title: 残局谜题系列 Endgame Puzzle Series
description: Create endgame puzzle short-form content — highest engagement format (30% viewer preference)

tasks.text: Curate 20 classic endgames from《适情雅趣》
Analyze all 40 positions with Pikafish engine
Write scripts: show bad moves first → reveal correct move
Record first 10 puzzle videos (vertical, 1-3 min each)
Edit with 剪映 — add auto-captions, bold text overlays
Create thumbnail templates for puzzle series
Publish first batch to Douyin + YouTube Shorts
Track engagement: views, completion rate, comments
Iterate format based on first batch analytics
